title: エンタープライズ営業担当
ai_summary: エンタープライズ営業担当の求人で、勤務地はハイブリッド勤務です。応募要件や具体的な仕事内容は記載されていませんが、営業経験が求められる可能性があります。勤務条件についての詳細は不明です。

title: Frontend Engineer
description: We are looking for a web frontend engineer to join PayPay. You will be building features that change how people in Japan use and manage their finances and business. As a fast-paced company leading the payments industry, we need our engineers to be versatile and enthusiastic to take on new challenges in order to stay at the forefront.
ai_summary: PayPayでは、ハイブリッド勤務のフロントエンドエンジニアを募集しています。日本の金融管理に革新をもたらす機能を開発する役割で、柔軟性と新しい挑戦への意欲が求められます。迅速な変化に対応できるエンジニアを歓迎します。

title: Data Engineer (DaaS)
description:
PayPay's rapid growth necessitates the expansion of its product teams and underscores the critical need for a resilient Data Engineering Platform. This platform is vital to support our increasing business demands. The Data Pipeline team is tasked with creating, deploying, and managing this platform, utilizing leading technologies like Databricks, Delta Lake, Spark, Scala, and the AWS suite.
We are actively seeking skilled Data Engineers to join our team and contribute to scaling our platform across the organization.
qualifications: Minimum 7 years as a Data Engineer or similar role. Hands-on experience with Databricks, Snowflake, Delta Lake, Spark, and Scala. Proven ability to design, build, and operate Data Lakes or Data Warehouses. Proficiency with Data Orchestration tools (Airflow, Dagster, Prefect). Familiarity with Change Data Capture tools (Canal, Debezium, Maxwell). Strong command of at least one primary language (Scala, Python, etc.) and SQL. Experience with data catalog and metadata management (Unity Catalog, Lakeformation). Experience in Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform. Excellent problem-solving and debugging abilities for complex data challenges. Strong communication and collaboration skills. Capability to make informed decisions, learn quickly, and consider complex technical contexts.
ai_summary: PayPayでは、データエンジニア（DaaS）を募集しており、ハイブリッド勤務が可能です。応募者は、7年以上のデータエンジニア経験とDatabricksやSparkなどの技術に精通していることが求められます。データレイクやデータウェアハウスの設計・運用経験、データオーケストレーションツールの使用経験も必要です。
